Consulting Accelerator™
When the facts change, I change my mind
1 In nature, life and business the rules of the game are constantly
changing. What serves you at one stage of development might
harm you at others. Facts of life and business change too.
When the facts change, I change my mind. It doesn’t matter
how deeply rooted or sacred anything is, when the rules of the
game change I dispose of it and evolve for new conditions.
In nature and business it’s not the strongest of species that
survives, nor the most intelligent, but rather the one most
adaptable to change.
“
-Sam Ovens
